prompt: A surreal abstract network of glowing nodes and connections in a dark space. At the center, a small dim node connected to several larger bright nodes. Each surrounding node is connected to many more nodes, forming dense clusters. The structure creates a feeling that every node is less connected than its neighbors. No text, no symbols, no labels. Cinematic lighting, depth of field, dreamlike, paradoxical, highly detailed, 4k
visual_logic: A central node appears less connected than surrounding nodes, while each surrounding node is more connected, creating a structural imbalance that reflects the paradox.
